title: Graaff-Reinet celebrates World Day of Prayer
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The World Day of Prayer was celebrated by various churches in Graaff-Reinet yesterday, 6 March.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The World Day of Prayer was celebrated by various churches in Graaff-Reinet yesterday, 6 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This year’s day was run under the motto ‘Informed Prayer and Prayerful Action’."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The programme started with a visit to Midlands Hospital to pray for the sick and visiting the kids in the facility.","html":"The programme started with a visit to Midlands Hospital to pray for the sick and visiting the kids in the facility."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many women gathered at the Holy Pentecost Apostolic Church in Zion, as well.","html":"Many women gathered at the Holy Pentecost Apostolic Church in Zion, as well."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"World Day of Prayer is an international ecumenical Christian laywomen’s initiative and is celebrated annually in over 170 countries on the first Friday in March.","html":"World Day of Prayer is an international ecumenical Christian laywomen’s initiative and is celebrated annually in over 170 countries on the first Friday in March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The movement aims to bring together women of various races, cultures and traditions in a yearly common day of prayer, as well as for closer fellowship, understanding and action throughout the year.","html":"The movement aims to bring together women of various races, cultures and traditions in a yearly common day of prayer, as well as for closer fellowship, understanding and action throughout the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through the World Day of Prayer, women are encouraged to become aware of the other countries and cultures and no longer live in isolation.","html":"Through the World Day of Prayer, women are encouraged to become aware of the other countries and cultures and no longer live in isolation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They are also encouraged take up the burdens of other people, to sympathise with the problems of other countries and cultures and pray with and for them.","html":"They are also encouraged take up the burdens of other people, to sympathise with the problems of other countries and cultures and pray with and for them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They are further encouraged to become aware of their talents and to use them in the service of society.","html":"They are further encouraged to become aware of their talents and to use them in the service of society."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The World Day of Prayer aims to demonstrate that prayer and action are inseparable and that both have immeasurable influence in the world.","html":"The World Day of Prayer aims to demonstrate that prayer and action are inseparable and that both have immeasurable influence in the world."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Graaff-Reinet celebrates World Day of Prayer
